scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm knip && turbo run typecheck test --affected
scripts.check:full: pnpm lint && pnpm knip && turbo run typecheck test build
scripts.dev:agent: PORTLESS_PORT=${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} PORTLESS_HTTPS=${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0} pnpm --filter paige exec portless run --name agent.paige pnpm dev
scripts.dev:web: PORTLESS_PORT=${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} PORTLESS_HTTPS=${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0} pnpm --filter @paige/web exec portless run --name paige pnpm dev:portless
